title: Create: Balanced Recipes
description: A Datapack ( You can turn into a mod ) for your create automation needs. Supplies players with Q.O.L recipes for everyday crafts!
body:
# **About**
A Create Mod/Datapack that just makes sense when you, as a player, yearn for mass automation of this beautiful mod! It adds Quality of Life recipes, such as balanced ore automation, uses for rotten flesh, and so much more! More examples can be found [Here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-balanced-recipes/gallery). 
Hope you enjoy!
## **Dependencies**
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) is needed to run this and [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) is recommended for this installation
### **Installation**
Add the .jar mod into your mod folder or install it into your world datapack folder if it's a datapack.
